INC-001.expected_action_summary: Routine battery replacement as per manual.

INC-002.expected_action_summary: Routine latch clear, no further action needed.

INC-003.expected_action_summary: Safety critical. Must lock device out of service and escalate to Facilities per manual.

INC-004.expected_action_summary: Second strike on battery replacement. Log warning per SOP-012.

INC-005.expected_action_summary: Power cycle device per E-04 manual instructions. Do not force lid.

INC-006.expected_action_summary: Safety critical (seal compromised). Lock out of service and escalate to Facilities.

INC-007.expected_action_summary: Third strike memory-aware escalation. Remove from service and escalate to External Vendor per SOP-012.

INC-008.expected_action_summary: Biohazard inside mechanical equipment. Danger. Quarantine device and call EVS and Biomed per SOP-011.

INC-009.expected_action_summary: Run internal pump recalibration per manual.
